message:
fix(storage): Address review findings in binary serialization

- Fix inconsistent return type in read_metadata_compat: JSON fallback
  was returning Value::Null via unwrap_or_default(), now consistently
  returns empty object like the rest of the function
- Collapse nested if statements per clippy collapsible_if lint

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
